heading: Enforcement of coastwise trade laws
label: 524 Enforcement of coastwise trade laws
text: Officers and members of the Coast Guard are authorized to enforce chapter 551 of title 46. The Secretary shall establish a program for these officers and members to enforce that chapter.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 100 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 100 of this title
